arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs Borussia Dortmund Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Leverkusen, currently second in the Bundesliga, will host fifth-placed Borussia Dortmund at the BayArena on Sunday, May 11th at 14:30 GMT. Both teams will be aiming for a strong finish to the season, ...

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Borussia Dortmund preview: Top four-chasing Dortmund look for huge win
arts.sum: Dethroned Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen will host Borussia Dortmund at BayArena on Sunday in their penultimate match of the season.
